name: ASUS A620M-AYW WIFI motherboard, AMD A620 (Ryzen AM5) mATX motherboard  DDR5, PCIe 4.0, dual M.2 slots, DisplayPort, HDMI, Realtek 2.5G wired network card, Wi-Fi 6. Supports USB 3.2 Gen 2
shortName: ASUS A620M-AYW WIFI motherboard, AMD A620 (Ryzen AM5) mATX
description: ASUS A620M-AYW WiFi is a budget-friendly micro-ATX motherboard with WiFi 6 and PCIe 4.0 support.
